steps.t: Thane Cútha is in the Beaconwatch Mead Hall. Meregyth wants you to speak with Thane Cútha to see what sort of assistance he can provide to Fenmarch.
Meregyth is in Beaconwatch, near the Mead Hall. Thane Cútha has refused to offer assistance to you and Meregyth or send aid to Fenmarch, but has allow…
